description: Whole-abdomen CT with dense pixel-level annotations of 16 organs, released for academic research by application.

name: FLARE21
full_name: MICCAI 2021 Fast and Low-resource Abdominal Organ Segmentation
multi_sequence_detail: multi-center abdominal CT
segmentation_detail: liver, kidney, spleen, pancreas
description: Multi-center abdominal CT for efficient four-organ segmentation from 11 medical centers.

name: FLARE22
multi_sequence_detail: multi-center abdominal CT
segmentation_detail: 13 abdominal organs
description: Semi-supervised abdominal CT benchmark with a large unlabeled pool for 13-organ segmentation.

name: FLARE23
multi_sequence_detail: multi-center abdominal CT
segmentation_detail: 13 abdominal organs + pan-cancer (any lesion)
description: Partially-labeled abdominal CT challenge for joint 13-organ and pan-cancer tumor segmentation.

name: Pancreas-CT (NIH)
multi_sequence_detail: portal-venous phase CT
segmentation_detail: pancreas (manual slice-by-slice)
description: 82 portal-venous abdominal CT scans with manual pancreas segmentations, a classic pancreas benchmark.

name: CT-ORG
full_name: CT volumes with multiple organ segmentations
multi_sequence_detail: mixed contrast/non-contrast; 9 from PET-CT
segmentation_detail: liver, lungs, bones, kidneys, bladder
description: 140 heterogeneous CT scans with 3D masks of five organs, sourced partly from PET-CT exams.

name: AbdomenCT-1K
multi_sequence_detail: multi-phase, multi-vendor, multi-disease CT
segmentation_detail: liver, kidney, spleen, pancreas
description: Over 1000 multi-center CT scans annotated for liver, kidney, spleen and pancreas.

name: PI-CAI
multi_sequence_detail: bi-parametric MRI: T2W, DWI (high b-value), ADC
segmentation_detail: csPCa lesion delineations + whole-gland annotations
description: Large public bi-parametric prostate MRI cohort with histopathology-linked labels for clinically significant cancer detection.

label_schema: Case-level label: clinically significant cancer yes/no with ISUP grade
details.file_structure: Per case: T2W, high-b DWI and ADC as .mha + annotations (human + AI) in separate folders; clinical CSV with PSA, ISUP, etc.

name: Prostate158
multi_sequence_detail: T2W, ADC, DWI
segmentation_detail: prostate zones + cancer lesions
description: Expert-annotated 3T bi-parametric prostate MRI with zonal anatomy and cancer segmentations.

label_schema: Zonal masks: transition/central zone, peripheral zone
details.file_structure: Per case NIfTI: T2W, ADC, DWI + t2_anatomy_reader1.nii.gz and adc_tumor_reader1.nii.gz label files.

name: PROMISE12
multi_sequence_detail: transversal T2-weighted MRI
segmentation_detail: whole prostate (capsule)
description: Multi-vendor transversal T2-weighted prostate MRI with whole-gland masks, a classic benchmark.

name: ProstateX
multi_sequence_detail: mpMRI: T2W, PD-W, DCE, DWI (b=50/400/800) + ADC
description: Multiparametric prostate MRI with marked lesions for predicting clinical significance of prostate cancer.

name: LLD-MMRI
full_name: Liver Lesion Diagnosis on Multi-phase MRI
multi_sequence_detail: non-contrast, arterial, venous, delayed, T2W, DWI, T1 in/out-of-phase
description: Multi-phase liver MRI for focal liver lesion diagnosis with per-lesion class labels and bounding boxes.

name: CT Colonography
multi_sequence_detail: paired prone and supine CT
description: Large screening CT colonography collection (prone/supine) with polyp annotations from the ACRIN 6664 trial.

name: MRNet
multi_sequence_detail: sagittal, coronal and axial series per exam
description: 1,370 knee MRI exams from Stanford with binary labels for abnormality, ACL tears and meniscal tears.

label_schema: 3 binary study-level labels: abnormal, ACL tear, meniscal tear
details.file_structure: Per exam: sagittal.npy, coronal.npy, axial.npy (stack of slices, s×256×256) + train/valid label CSVs.

name: fastMRI knee
full_name: fastMRI Knee Raw k-Space and DICOM Dataset
size: >1,500 fully-sampled knee k-space MRIs + 10,000 clinical DICOM knee MRIs (~1.35 TB)
multi_sequence_detail: coronal proton-density with and without fat suppression
description: Raw k-space and DICOM knee MRI data released by NYU and Meta AI for accelerated MRI reconstruction research.

label_schema: No pathology labels — raw fully-sampled multi-coil k-space + reconstructed images for MRI reconstruction
details.file_structure: HDF5 per volume (kspace, reconstruction_rss); singlecoil and multicoil tracks; DICOMs separately.
details.splits: Official train / val / test / challenge splits

name: OAI
size: 4,796 participants, longitudinal bilateral knee MRI and X-ray
multi_sequence_detail: multiple knee MRI sequences (DESS, T2 mapping, TSE) plus radiographs
description: Longitudinal osteoarthritis cohort of 4,796 participants with serial bilateral knee MRI, radiographs and clinical data.

name: MURA
description: Large upper-extremity radiograph dataset covering seven body parts with radiologist normal/abnormal study labels.

name: RSNA Bone Age
description: Pediatric left-hand radiographs labeled with skeletal bone age and sex for bone-age estimation.

name: SKM-TEA
segmentation_detail: 4 tissues (patellar, femoral, tibial cartilage, meniscus)
description: Quantitative double-echo steady-state knee MRI with raw k-space, DICOM, tissue segmentations and pathology bounding boxes.

name: KneeMRI
description: 917 sagittal PD-weighted knee MRI volumes from Rijeka, Croatia, labeled for anterior cruciate ligament condition.

name: Digital Hand Atlas
full_name: Digital Hand Atlas for Skeletal Development
description: Reference collection of ~1,400 normal pediatric hand radiographs across ages, sexes and ethnic groups for bone-age assessment.

name: LERA
description: Lower-extremity radiographs (foot, knee, ankle, hip) from 182 patients with radiologist normal/abnormal labels.

name: RSNA Screening Mammography
full_name: RSNA Screening Mammography Breast Cancer Detection (2023)
description: De-identified screening mammograms (~54,700 DICOM images) with a cancer label and BI-RADS/density metadata for breast-cancer detection.

name: CBIS-DDSM
full_name: Curated Breast Imaging Subset of DDSM
segmentation_detail: ROI masks and bounding boxes for masses and calcifications
description: Curated DICOM-converted subset of DDSM screening mammograms with pathology labels, BI-RADS and ROI segmentations.

label_schema: Pathology: BENIGN / BENIGN_WITHOUT_CALLBACK / MALIGNANT; BI-RADS assessment 0–5; breast density 1–4
ROI segmentation mask + cropped patch per lesion
details.file_structure: DICOM full images + ROI mask + cropped images; CSV descriptors for mass/calc train and test separately.

name: VinDr-Mammo
segmentation_detail: bounding-box annotations for findings (BI-RADS 3-5)
description: Full-field digital mammography benchmark of 5,000 four-view exams with breast-level BI-RADS/density and bounding-box finding annotations.

name: CMMD
description: Mammography database of 1,775 Chinese patients with biopsy-confirmed benign/malignant labels and molecular subtype for a subset.

name: INbreast
segmentation_detail: expert pixel-level lesion contours (XML)
description: Full-field digital mammography database (410 images) from Porto with BI-RADS, density and expert XML lesion contours; access by request.

name: Duke Breast Cancer MRI
full_name: Dynamic Contrast-Enhanced MRI of Breast Cancer Patients (Duke)
multi_sequence_detail: DCE-MRI: non-fat-sat T1, fat-sat pre-contrast and 3-4 post-contrast sequences
segmentation_detail: radiologist 3D bounding boxes around lesions
description: DCE-MRI of 922 invasive breast cancer patients with 3D tumor bounding boxes plus extensive clinical, genomic and radiomic data.

name: Breast-Diagnosis
multi_sequence_detail: 3+ MR pulse sequences (T2, STIR, BLISS) with contrast; plus PET, CT, mammography
description: Multi-modality breast imaging (multi-sequence MR, PET, CT, mammography) for 88 subjects with lesion-type and biomarker data.

name: BCS-DBT
full_name: Breast Cancer Screening — Digital Breast Tomosynthesis
segmentation_detail: bounding boxes for lesions
description: Large digital breast tomosynthesis screening dataset of 5,060 patients with normal/actionable/benign/cancer labels and lesion bounding boxes.

name: ISPY1 (ACRIN 6657)
full_name: Breast DCE-MRI from the I-SPY 1 / ACRIN 6657 trial
multi_sequence_detail: DCE-MRI across 4 neoadjuvant-chemo timepoints; T2 + pre/post-contrast T1
segmentation_detail: functional tumor volume segmentations
description: Multi-center serial DCE-MRI (222 patients, 4 timepoints) with functional tumor volume segmentations for predicting chemotherapy response.

name: ISPY2
multi_sequence_detail: DCE-MRI + T2 across 4 treatment timepoints; derived parametric maps
segmentation_detail: functional tumor volume masks (DICOM SEG)
description: I-SPY 2 trial serial breast DCE-MRI (719 patients, 4 timepoints) with parametric maps and DICOM-SEG functional tumor volume segmentations.

name: BreastDM
full_name: BreastDM: DCE-MRI dataset for breast tumor segmentation and classification
multi_sequence_detail: DCE-MRI with pre-contrast, post-contrast and subtraction sequences
segmentation_detail: tumor segmentation masks (PNG)
description: Breast DCE-MRI dataset of 232 cases with tumor segmentation masks and benign/malignant labels, distributed via GitHub.

name: EMBED
description: Large, racially diverse Emory mammography dataset (2D, C-view and DBT) with 60,000 lesions linked to BI-RADS descriptors and pathologic outcomes.

name: HECKTOR
full_name: HEad and neCK TumOR segmentation and outcome prediction challenge
paired_text_detail: clinical data (age, sex, HPV, treatment) and recurrence-free survival endpoints
segmentation_detail: primary tumor (GTVp) and lymph node (GTVn) contours
description: MICCAI challenge for automatic segmentation of head and neck tumors and lymph nodes and outcome prediction in FDG-PET/CT.

details.file_structure: Per patient: CT.nii.gz, PT.nii.gz (PET) and a GTV label NIfTI; clinical CSV with HPV, treatment and survival.

name: HNSCC
full_name: Head and Neck Squamous Cell Carcinoma (MD Anderson)
paired_text_detail: demographics, risk factors, stage, recurrence, survival and treatment data
segmentation_detail: primary and nodal gross tumor volume contours (RTSTRUCT)
description: TCIA collection of imaging, radiation therapy and clinical data from 627 head and neck squamous cell carcinoma patients at MD Anderson.

name: HN1
paired_text_detail: demographic, follow-up, chemotherapy and survival data
segmentation_detail: pre-treatment gross tumor volume (DICOM SEG and RTSTRUCT)
description: TCIA radiomics collection of pre-treatment CT and clinical/outcome data for 137 head and neck cancer patients from MAASTRO.

name: TCGA-HNSC
full_name: TCGA Head-Neck Squamous Cell Carcinoma Collection
paired_text_detail: matched clinical, pathological and genomic data via TCGA/GDC
segmentation_detail: radiation therapy structures (RTSTRUCT) for a subset
license: CC BY 3.0; some imaging controlled access
description: TCIA imaging collection for 227 head and neck cancer patients matched to genomic and clinical data in The Cancer Genome Atlas.

name: Head-Neck-PET-CT
paired_text_detail: histopathology, tumor grade and follow-up outcomes
segmentation_detail: radiotherapy GTV contours (RTSTRUCT)
description: TCIA collection of FDG-PET/CT and radiotherapy planning CT with GTV contours and outcome data for 298 head and neck cancer patients.

name: RADCURE
full_name: CT Images from a Large Head and Neck Cohort (RADCURE)
paired_text_detail: demographic, diagnosis, treatment and follow-up data with survival status
segmentation_detail: primary GTV, nodal GTV and 19 organs-at-risk contours
description: TCIA head and neck CT dataset of 3,346 patients treated with definitive radiotherapy, with tumor and organ-at-risk contours and outcomes.

name: QIN-HeadNeck
paired_text_detail: clinical data (demographics, treatment, follow-up) in XLSX
segmentation_detail: DICOM SEG segmentations plus DICOM SR quantitative PET/CT results
license: CC BY 3.0; some imaging controlled access
description: TCIA collection of serial pre/post-therapy FDG-PET/CT with DICOM SEG/SR quantitative analysis objects for head and neck cancer.

name: DENTEX
full_name: Dental Enumeration and Diagnosis on Panoramic X-rays (MICCAI 2023)
description: Panoramic dental X-rays hierarchically annotated (FDI) for abnormal-tooth detection with quadrant, enumeration and diagnosis.

name: Tufts Dental Database
full_name: Tufts Dental Database (TDD): multimodal panoramic X-ray dataset
paired_text_detail: radiologist think-aloud text descriptions plus eye-tracking gaze maps
segmentation_detail: teeth masks, maxillomandibular masks and abnormality masks
description: 1,000 expert-annotated panoramic dental radiographs with tooth/abnormality masks plus radiologist eye-tracking and text descriptions.

name: ToothFairy2
segmentation_detail: 42-class 3D masks: teeth (FDI), mandible, maxilla, alveolar canals, sinuses, implants
description: First fully-annotated public CBCT dataset with 42-class 3D expert segmentations of dental and maxillofacial structures at 0.3mm voxels.

name: CTooth
full_name: CTooth: 3D Tooth Volume Segmentation on CBCT
segmentation_detail: 3D tooth-volume voxel masks
description: Fully annotated CBCT tooth-volume segmentation benchmark of 22 volumes, extended by CTooth+ with 146 additional unlabeled volumes.

name: autoPET I
full_name: Automated Lesion Segmentation in Whole-Body FDG-PET/CT (autoPET 2022)
segmentation_detail: manual whole-body FDG-avid tumor lesion masks
description: MICCAI 2022 challenge for automated tumor lesion segmentation on whole-body FDG-PET/CT (900 patients, melanoma/lymphoma/NSCLC and controls).

label_schema: Binary whole-body mask of FDG-avid malignant lesions (0 = background/physiologic uptake, 1 = tumor lesion)
details.file_structure: Per study: CT.nii.gz, SUV.nii.gz (PET SUV), CTres.nii.gz and SEG.nii.gz; also DICOM on TCIA (FDG-PET-CT-Lesions).

name: autoPET III
full_name: Automated Lesion Segmentation in Multitracer PET/CT (autoPET III 2024)
multi_sequence_detail: multi-tracer: FDG and PSMA PET; PET + CT
segmentation_detail: manual whole-body tumor lesion masks for FDG- and PSMA-avid lesions
license: FDG: TCIA Restricted; PSMA: CC BY 4.0
description: Third autoPET edition extending the task to multi-tracer whole-body PET/CT by combining FDG and PSMA collections (1,611 training studies).

name: FDG-PET-CT-Lesions
full_name: Whole-body FDG-PET/CT dataset with manually annotated tumor lesions
segmentation_detail: manual 3D segmentation of FDG-avid malignant lesions (501 positive, 513 controls)
license: TCIA Restricted (DICOM); NIfTI mirror CC BY-NC 4.0
description: TCIA collection of 1,014 whole-body FDG-PET/CT studies with manually annotated tumor lesions, the FDG training data behind autoPET.

name: PSMA-PET-CT-Lesions
full_name: Whole-body PSMA-PET/CT dataset with manually annotated tumor lesions
segmentation_detail: manual 3D segmentation of PSMA-avid tumor lesions (DICOM SEG)
description: TCIA collection of 597 whole-body PSMA-PET/CT studies from 378 prostate-cancer patients with manually annotated lesions.

name: ROCO
paired_text_detail: captions + UMLS concepts (CUIs), keywords
description: Multimodal radiology image-caption dataset mined from PubMed Central Open Access articles, spanning multiple modalities and body regions.

name: ROCOv2
size: 79,789 images with captions and UMLS concepts
paired_text_detail: captions + manually curated UMLS CUIs, keywords
description: Updated multimodal radiology image dataset from PMC Open Access with manually curated modality and anatomy concepts, used in ImageCLEFmedical Caption.

name: MedICaT
full_name: Medical Images, Captions, and Textual References
paired_text_detail: captions, inline textual references and subfigure-subcaption annotations
description: Medical figures with captions, inline references and compound-figure/subcaption annotations extracted from PubMed Central and S2ORC.

name: PMC-OA
paired_text_detail: captions aligned at subfigure/subcaption granularity
description: Large biomedical image-caption archive from PubMed Central Open Access used to pretrain the PMC-CLIP vision-language model.

name: VQA-RAD
paired_text_detail: clinician-generated QA pairs (open- and closed-ended)
description: Radiology VQA dataset of head CT/MRI, chest X-rays and abdominal CTs with clinician-authored question-answer pairs.

name: SLAKE
paired_text_detail: bilingual (English-Chinese) QA pairs, vision- and knowledge-based
segmentation_detail: semantic segmentation masks and object-detection boxes per image
description: Bilingual radiology VQA dataset covering 39 organs and 12 diseases, annotated with segmentation masks, bounding boxes and a medical knowledge graph.

name: MS-CXR
full_name: MS-CXR: Making the Most of Text Semantics
paired_text_detail: radiologist-verified phrases describing findings, paired to bounding boxes
description: Phrase-grounding benchmark over MIMIC-CXR images with radiologist-annotated bounding boxes paired to real report sentences across eight findings.

name: Chest ImaGenome
paired_text_detail: scene-graph relations linking anatomy boxes to report-derived attributes
description: Scene-graph dataset auto-derived from MIMIC-CXR with 29 anatomy bounding boxes, attributes and longitudinal comparison relations per image.

name: REFLACX
full_name: Reports and Eye-Tracking Data for Localization of Abnormalities in Chest X-rays
size: 3,032 eye-tracking + report sessions for 2,616 chest X-rays
paired_text_detail: timestamped dictated report transcriptions synced with gaze data
description: Radiologist eye-tracking and timestamped report transcriptions over MIMIC-CXR images, with bounding boxes and abnormality localizations.

name: Medical-Diff-VQA
paired_text_detail: difference-oriented question-answer pairs comparing paired studies
description: Large difference-VQA dataset derived from MIMIC-CXR for answering questions about changes between a patient's main and reference chest X-rays.

name: RadGenome-ChestCT
size: 25,692 CT volumes with 665K grounded report regions + 1.3M VQA
paired_text_detail: multi-granularity grounded reports and grounded QA pairs linked to regions
segmentation_detail: 197 organ-level segmentation masks per volume linked to report sentences
description: Grounded vision-language extension of CT-RATE adding organ segmentation masks, region-linked reports and grounded VQA pairs for 3D chest CT.

name: INSPECT
full_name: Integrating Numerous Sources for Prognostic Evaluation of Clinical Timelines
size: 23,248 CTPA studies / 19,402 patients with reports and EHR
paired_text_detail: radiology report impressions plus structured longitudinal EHR data
description: Multimodal dataset linking CTPA images, radiology reports and structured EHR at scale for pulmonary embolism diagnosis and prognosis.

name: MAIDA
size: multi-institution chest X-rays across 22+ hospitals in 12 countries
paired_text_detail: DICOM metadata and annotations (endotracheal tube placement, pneumonia)
description: Global data-sharing initiative providing multi-institution chest X-rays for ICU/NICU/ED tasks such as endotracheal-tube and pneumonia assessment.

name: TCIA
description: NCI-funded public archive of de-identified cancer medical images (mostly DICOM) organized into collections by disease, modality or research focus.

name: PhysioNet
paired_text_detail: many datasets pair images with reports/clinical data (e.g. MIMIC-CXR)
description: MIT-hosted repository of physiological and clinical research data, including major credentialed radiology datasets such as MIMIC-CXR and its derivatives.

name: OpenNeuro
multi_sequence_detail: BIDS-organized MRI/fMRI/EEG/MEG/PET incl. multi-sequence MRI
description: Free BIDS-compliant repository for openly sharing neuroimaging datasets (MRI, fMRI, EEG, MEG, PET), operated by the Stanford Center for Reproducible Neuroscience.

name: Grand Challenge
segmentation_detail: many hosted challenges provide expert segmentation annotations
description: Open platform for hosting biomedical imaging challenges, expert annotation collection and deployment of deep-learning algorithms.

name: Synapse
description: Sage Bionetworks collaborative research platform hosting biomedical datasets, challenges (incl. BraTS) and imaging benchmarks with governance controls.

name: Zenodo
description: CERN-operated general-purpose open research repository with DOI minting, widely used to publish radiology datasets such as ROCOv2 and TotalSegmentator.

name: Kaggle Datasets
size: hundreds of thousands of public datasets
description: Community data-science platform hosting many public medical-imaging datasets and competitions (e.g. RSNA, chest X-ray challenges).

name: Stanford AIMI
paired_text_detail: several datasets include reports/annotations (e.g. CheXpert, INSPECT)
segmentation_detail: some datasets include expert segmentation/annotation
description: Stanford Center for AI in Medicine and Imaging portal of de-identified, annotated clinical imaging datasets across modalities for non-commercial research.

name: IDC
segmentation_detail: includes image-derived annotations, segmentations and measurements
description: Cloud-based NCI node collocating public cancer imaging collections with Google Cloud analysis tools; no registration required to browse and download.

name: UK Biobank Imaging
multi_sequence_detail: brain multi-sequence MRI (T1, FLAIR, SWI, fMRI, dMRI), cardiac/abdominal MRI, DXA, carotid US
description: World's largest multi-modal imaging study, scanning 100,000 volunteers with brain/cardiac/abdominal MRI, DXA and carotid ultrasound linked to genetic and phenotypic data.

name: Medical Segmentation Decathlon
multi_sequence_detail: includes multi-parametric MRI tasks (brain, prostate) and CT tasks
segmentation_detail: expert voxel-level labels for all 10 tasks
description: Benchmark suite of ten 3D CT/MRI segmentation tasks with expert labels spanning diverse organs and lesions (individual tasks also listed separately).

name: AWS Open Data
full_name: Registry of Open Data on AWS
description: Registry of openly available datasets hosted on AWS S3, including medical imaging resources such as the Medical Segmentation Decathlon and EMBED.

name: Hugging Face
paired_text_detail: hosts many image-text/report/VQA datasets (CT-RATE, RadGenome, VQA-RAD, PMC-OA)
description: Machine-learning dataset hub hosting a large and growing collection of medical imaging and multimodal radiology datasets, some gated behind usage agreements.

name: Radiopaedia
paired_text_detail: case descriptions, findings and teaching text per case
multi_sequence_detail: cases include multi-sequence MRI and multi-modality studies
description: Collaborative open-edit radiology reference and teaching archive with tens of thousands of annotated cases spanning all modalities and body regions.

name: CT-RATE
full_name: Chest CT with Radiology Text and Extended labels
size: 25,692 CT volumes (50,188 with reconstructions) from 21,304 patients; ~21.3 TB
paired_text_detail: Free-text radiology reports for every volume, plus 18-class multi-abnormality labels and metadata
multi_sequence_detail: Non-contrast chest CT; multiple reconstruction matrices but single phase
description: A large-scale 3D chest CT dataset of 25,692 non-contrast volumes from 21,304 patients paired with free-text radiology reports and 18-class multi-abnormality labels, used to train the CT-CLIP foundation model.

name: MR-RATE
full_name: MRI with Radiology Text and Extended labels
size: 705,254 MRI volumes from 98,334 studies of 83,425 patients (~8-38 TB across repositories)
paired_text_detail: Anonymized, LLM-structured radiology reports (clinical information, technique, findings, impression) per study, plus pathology labels across 37 brain/spine categories grounded in SNOMED CT/RadLex
multi_sequence_detail: T1-weighted, T2-weighted, FLAIR, SWI, and MRA sequences; non-contrast and contrast-enhanced
segmentation_detail: Brain masks and defacing masks accompany volumes; multi-label anatomical (brain/body) segmentations, co-registered within-study volumes, and MNI152 atlas-registered volumes are also provided
description: A large-scale brain and spine MRI dataset of over 705,000 multi-sequence volumes from ~98,000 studies paired with structured radiology reports and segmentation masks.

name: Merlin
full_name: Merlin: A Computed Tomography Vision-Language Foundation Model and Dataset
size: 25,494 abdominal/pelvic CT scans from 18,317 patients (>6M images)
paired_text_detail: Paired free-text radiology reports plus structured EHR data (>1.8M ICD diagnosis codes)
license: Stanford University Dataset Research Use Agreement
description: A native-3D abdominal/pelvic CT dataset of 25,494 scans from 18,317 patients paired with radiology reports and ICD/EHR diagnosis codes, released to train the Merlin CT vision-language foundation model.

name: ReXGradient-160K
full_name: ReXGradient-160K: A Large-Scale Publicly Available Dataset of Chest Radiographs with Free-text Reports
size: 273,004 images from 160,000 studies of 109,487 patients across 79 sites (3 U.S. health systems)
paired_text_detail: Structured free-text radiology reports per study with four sections: indication, comparison, findings, and impression
license: Custom non-commercial research data use agreement (accepted on Hugging Face)
description: A large multi-site chest X-ray dataset of 273,004 PNG images from 160,000 studies across 79 U.S. sites, each paired with structured free-text radiology reports.

name: PadChest-GR
full_name: PadChest-GR: A Bilingual Chest X-ray Dataset for Grounded Radiology Report Generation
size: 4,555 CXR studies (3,099 abnormal, 1,456 normal); 7,037 positive and 3,422 negative finding sentences; ~46 GB
paired_text_detail: Sentence-level grounded reports in English and Spanish describing present (positive) and absent (negative) findings
other_labels: bounding boxes per positive finding (up to two independent reader sets)
license: PADCHEST Dataset Research Use Agreement (free for research)
description: A manually curated bilingual (English/Spanish) chest X-ray dataset of 4,555 studies with sentence-level grounded radiology reports and radiologist-annotated bounding boxes for grounded report generation.

name: MedTrinity-25M
full_name: MedTrinity-25M: A Large-scale Multimodal Dataset with Multigranular Annotations for Medicine
anatomy: Whole body (multiple regions, e.g. chest, brain, abdomen)
size: ~25M images (18M accessible image-text pairs) across 10 modalities
paired_text_detail: Multigranular text annotations: disease/lesion type, modality, region-specific descriptions, and inter-region relationships
segmentation_detail: Automatically generated region-of-interest segmentation masks and bounding boxes included in the multigranular annotations
license: Mixed (CC BY 4.0 for some sources; some constituent datasets proprietary/credentialed, e.g. CheXpert, MIMIC-CXR-JPG)
description: A large-scale multimodal medical dataset of ~25M images across 10 modalities (including CT, MRI, and X-ray) with automatically generated multigranular text annotations, bounding boxes, and segmentation masks.

name: CheXpert Plus
full_name: CheXpert Plus: Augmenting a Large Chest X-ray Dataset with Text Radiology Reports, Patient Demographics and Additional Image Formats
size: 223,228 chest radiographs paired with 187,711 radiology reports from 64,725 patients
paired_text_detail: De-identified free-text radiology reports (36M text tokens, ~1M PHI spans anonymized) paired with images, plus CheXbert structured labels and RadGraph-XL annotations
license: Stanford University Dataset Research Use Agreement
description: An augmentation of the CheXpert dataset pairing 223,228 chest radiographs (in DICOM and PNG) with 187,711 de-identified free-text radiology reports, patient demographics, and structured labels for 64,725 patients.

name: DRR-RATE
full_name: DRR-RATE: Digitally Reconstructed Radiographs from CT-RATE
paired_text_detail: Radiology reports inherited from CT-RATE, plus 18-class binary pathology labels
description: A dataset of 50,188 digitally reconstructed chest radiographs generated from CT-RATE CT volumes via Siddon-Jacobs ray tracing (frontal and lateral views), paired with inherited radiology reports and 18-class binary pathology labels.

name: BIMCV
full_name: Medical Imaging Databank of the Valencia Region (BIMCV: PadChest, BIMCV-COVID19+)
size: PadChest ~160,000 CXR images from ~67,000 patients; BIMCV-COVID19+ tens of thousands of CXR/CT studies
paired_text_detail: PadChest includes Spanish radiology reports and UMLS-coded labels; BIMCV-COVID19+ includes radiographic findings, RT-PCR/antibody results and DICOM metadata
description: A regional medical imaging repository hosting large open chest imaging datasets including PadChest (chest X-rays with Spanish reports/labels) and BIMCV-COVID19+ (chest X-ray and CT studies with reports and clinical results).

name: AbdomenAtlas 1.1
anatomy: abdominal organs, thorax organs, vasculature, skeletal structures
multi_sequence_detail: CT volumes span multiple contrast phases (pre-contrast, arterial, portal-venous, delayed).
segmentation_detail: Per-voxel annotations for 25 anatomical structures (organs, vascular and skeletal structures) plus pseudo-labels for 7 tumor types.
host: GitHub / Hugging Face (MrGiovanni/AbdomenAtlas, AbdomenAtlas HF org)
description: An expanded release of AbdomenAtlas with 9,262 multi-phase CT volumes annotated per-voxel for 25 anatomical structures plus pseudo-labels for seven tumor types.

name: AbdomenAtlas 3.0
anatomy: abdominal organs, tumors (liver, kidney, pancreas), pancreas sub-segments, peripancreatic vessels
size: 9,262 CT volumes (3,220 with a contrast-enhanced phase) + reports
paired_text_detail: First public abdominal CT dataset with paired radiology reports (>9,000 CT scans with structured/'superhuman' reports generated by RadGPT).
multi_sequence_detail: Includes contrast-enhanced phases; 3,220 scans have at least one contrast-enhanced phase.
segmentation_detail: Per-voxel segmentations of liver, kidney and pancreatic tumors, nine core organs, plus pancreas sub-segments and peripancreatic blood vessels.
description: An ICCV 2025 abdominal CT dataset pairing over 9,000 CT volumes with radiology reports and per-voxel tumor, organ, pancreas sub-segment and vessel annotations in NIfTI format.

name: TotalSegmentator-MRI
anatomy: whole-body anatomy (organs, bones, muscles, vessels, tissues)
multi_sequence_detail: Sequence-independent dataset spanning diverse clinical MRI sequences, scanners and institutions; some images sourced from the Imaging Data Commons.
segmentation_detail: Voxel segmentations of 50 anatomical structures across organs, bones, muscles, vessels and tissues.
description: An open real-world clinical MRI dataset of 616 scans annotated with voxel segmentations of 50 anatomical structures, released with the sequence-independent TotalSegmentator MRI model.

name: ULS23
anatomy: thorax-abdomen (universal lesions: bone, pancreas, lymph node, liver, kidney, lung, etc.)
size: ~38,000 lesion VOIs across multi-part release; e.g. Part 1 = 1,618 lesions, 15.9 GB
segmentation_detail: 3D voxel-level segmentation masks of lesions across many organ types; novel fully-annotated Radboudumc/Jeroen Bosch data plus curated public sources (DeepLesion, KiTS21, LIDC-IDRI, LiTS, MSD, NIH-LN, CCC18)
description: A CT benchmark for universal 3D lesion segmentation aggregating novel fully-annotated data and curated public annotated lesion datasets across the thorax and abdomen, released as NIfTI lesion VOIs with 3D segmentation masks.

name: ATLAS
full_name: A Tumour and Liver Automatic Segmentation (ATLAS) MICCAI 2023 Challenge
size: 90 T1 contrast-enhanced MRI scans (60 train / 30 test) from 90 unresectable HCC patients
multi_sequence_detail: T1 contrast-enhanced MRI with variation in image resolution, contrast phase, sequence and MRI manufacturer.
segmentation_detail: Binary segmentation masks for two structures: liver (parenchyma) and tumor(s).
description: A MICCAI 2023 challenge dataset of 90 T1 contrast-enhanced liver MRI scans from unresectable HCC patients with liver and tumor segmentation labels.

name: SegRap2023
full_name: Segmentation of Organs-at-Risk and Gross Tumor Volume of NPC (SegRap 2023)
anatomy: head and neck organs-at-risk and nasopharyngeal carcinoma tumor volumes
size: 400 CT scans (200 patients, paired contrast-enhanced + non-contrast); 120 train, 20 validation, 60 test
multi_sequence_detail: Paired non-contrast and contrast-enhanced CT per patient.
segmentation_detail: Voxel annotations of 45 organs-at-risk plus 2 gross tumor volumes (GTVnx primary, GTVnd nodal).
description: A MICCAI 2023 head-and-neck CT dataset of 200 nasopharyngeal carcinoma patients with paired contrast/non-contrast scans, annotated for 45 organs-at-risk and two gross tumor volumes.

name: PANORAMA
full_name: Pancreatic Cancer Diagnosis - Radiologists Meet AI (PANORAMA)
size: ~2,238 CECT training scans (two centers) plus 194 MSD and 80 NIH external cases; ~197 GB
segmentation_detail: Segmentation labels provided in companion repo DIAGNijmegen/panorama_labels: PDAC lesion (manual), plus pancreas parenchyma, veins, arteries, pancreatic duct, and common bile duct (automatic). Manual lesion segmentations for PDAC cases.
description: A large multi-center contrast-enhanced abdominal CT dataset of ~2,200+ scans enriched for pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma with pancreas and tumor segmentation annotations.

name: TopCoW 2024
full_name: Topology-Aware Anatomical Segmentation of the Circle of Willis
size: 125 training patients (250 paired CTA+MRA images), plus 10 validation and 70 test pairs
multi_sequence_detail: Paired CTA and MRA of the same patients (two modalities, not multi-sequence)
segmentation_detail: Multi-class voxel annotations of up to 13 Circle of Willis vessel components
license: Open use with attribution; commercial use requires data-owner permission
description: The first public dataset with paired CTA and MRA from the same patients and voxel-level multi-class annotations of the Circle of Willis vessels, released via the TopCoW 2024 MICCAI challenge.

name: CURVAS
full_name: Calibration and Uncertainty for multiRater Volume Assessment in multiorgan Segmentation
segmentation_detail: Multi-rater segmentations by three independent experts of pancreas, kidney and liver on contrast-enhanced (portal venous phase) abdominal CT
other_labels: multi-rater annotations for inter-rater variability, uncertainty and calibration
description: Ninety contrast-enhanced abdominal CT scans, each segmented independently by three experts for pancreas, kidney and liver, to study inter-rater variability, uncertainty and model calibration in multi-organ segmentation.

name: MAMA-MIA
full_name: MAMA-MIA: A Large-Scale Multi-Center Breast Cancer DCE-MRI Benchmark Dataset
size: 1,506 annotated training scans plus 574 external validation cases (multi-institutional)
paired_text_detail: Structured clinical and demographic variables per case, including pathologic complete response (pCR) to neoadjuvant chemotherapy
multi_sequence_detail: Dynamic contrast-enhanced MRI with a pre-contrast phase and multiple post-contrast phases
segmentation_detail: Expert manual and automated primary-tumor segmentation masks
description: A large multi-institutional homogenized breast dynamic contrast-enhanced MRI dataset with expert primary-tumor segmentations and clinical variables for tumor segmentation and treatment-response prediction.

name: HNTS-MRG 2024
full_name: Head and Neck Tumor Segmentation for MR-Guided Radiotherapy 2024
anatomy: Head and neck (primary tumor GTVp and nodal GTVn volumes)
size: ~150 training patients (pre-RT and mid-RT), ~50 test patients
multi_sequence_detail: Primarily T2-weighted MRI at each timepoint
segmentation_detail: Expert GTVp (primary tumor) and GTVn (nodal) segmentation masks on pre-RT and mid-RT MRI
description: An MRI dataset of head-and-neck cancer patients imaged pre- and mid-radiotherapy with expert primary and nodal tumor segmentations for MR-guided adaptive radiotherapy.

name: AortaSeg24
full_name: Multi-Class Segmentation of Aortic Branches and Zones in CTA
segmentation_detail: Multi-class segmentation of the aorta, individual branch vessels, and clinically relevant SVS/STS aortic zones (23 classes)
description: A MICCAI 2024 challenge providing 100 annotated CT angiography volumes with multi-class labels of aortic branches and SVS/STS zones for automated aorta segmentation and surgical planning in type B aortic dissection.

name: LNQ2023
segmentation_detail: Segmentation masks of mediastinal lymph nodes >1 cm from cancer clinical-trial patients; partially annotated training (subset of nodes), fully annotated validation/test
description: A contrast-enhanced chest CT benchmark for weakly-supervised segmentation of enlarged mediastinal lymph nodes from oncology clinical-trial imaging, with data hosted on TCIA (MEDIASTINAL-LYMPH-NODE-SEG, 513 subjects).

name: ISLES 2024
multi_sequence_detail: Acute multimodal CT (NCCT, CTA, CT perfusion source and derived perfusion maps); final infarct ground truth derived from follow-up MRI (DWI)
segmentation_detail: Binary segmentation mask of the final post-treatment ischemic stroke infarct
description: A stroke imaging challenge providing acute multimodal CT (NCCT, CTA, CT perfusion) with follow-up-MRI-derived infarct masks and tabular clinical data for final ischemic lesion segmentation.

name: PENGWIN
full_name: Pelvic Bone Fragments with Injuries Segmentation Challenge
anatomy: Pelvic bones (sacrum and hipbone fracture fragments)
size: 150 patient CT scans plus synthetically generated 2D X-ray images
segmentation_detail: Semi-automatically annotated and medical-expert-validated segmentations of sacrum and hipbone fracture fragments in 3D CT and in 2D X-ray
description: A MICCAI 2024 challenge dataset of 150 pelvic fracture CT scans and synthetically generated 2D X-rays with expert-validated fragment-level segmentation annotations of the sacrum and hipbone.

name: CMRxRecon2024
multi_sequence_detail: Multi-contrast raw k-space: cine, T1/T2 mapping, tagging, phase-contrast (flow2d) and dark-blood imaging across long-axis, short-axis, outflow-tract and aortic views, with undersampling masks/trajectories and autocalibration signals
description: A multi-contrast, multi-view raw cardiac MRI k-space dataset from 330 volunteers on a Siemens 3T scanner for developing accelerated undersampled reconstruction methods.

name: CMRxMotion
full_name: Extreme Cardiac MRI Analysis Challenge under Respiratory Motion
anatomy: Heart (left ventricle, left ventricle myocardium, right ventricle)
size: ~40 healthy volunteers imaged under 4 respiratory-motion levels
segmentation_detail: Left ventricle, left ventricle myocardium and right ventricle segmentation on cine MRI (diagnostically adequate images)
description: Cine cardiac MRI from ~40 volunteers acquired under four respiratory-motion conditions with radiologist image-quality grades and LV/myocardium/RV segmentations for motion-robustness benchmarking (MICCAI 2022 STACOM).

name: LUMIERE
size: 91 patients, 638 study dates, 2487 MRI images (~32.5 GB imaging ZIP)
paired_text_detail: Expert RANO tumor-response ratings plus demographics, pathology and survival/clinical data provided as separate tables
multi_sequence_detail: Multiparametric MRI: pre-contrast T1, post-contrast T1, T2 and FLAIR at each timepoint (599 of 638 studies have all four)
segmentation_detail: Automated tumor segmentations from DeepBraTumIA and HD-GLIO-AUTO for timepoints with all four sequences
description: A longitudinal multiparametric MRI dataset of 91 glioblastoma patients across 638 study dates with automated tumor segmentations and expert RANO response ratings.

name: BraTS 2024 Post-Treatment Glioma (BraTS-GLI)
full_name: 2024 Brain Tumor Segmentation Challenge: Adult Glioma Post-Treatment
multi_sequence_detail: Co-registered, skull-stripped native T1, post-contrast T1 (T1c/T1Gd), T2, and T2-FLAIR sequences
segmentation_detail: Expert annotations of four sub-regions: enhancing tissue (ET), non-enhancing tumor core (NETC), surrounding non-enhancing FLAIR hyperintensity (SNFH), and resection cavity (RC)
description: The BraTS 2024 post-treatment adult glioma challenge provides multi-sequence brain MRI (T1, T1c, T2, T2-FLAIR) with expert segmentations of enhancing tissue, non-enhancing tumor core, FLAIR hyperintensity, and resection cavity for post-therapy glioma monitoring.

name: BraTS-MEN-RT 2024
full_name: 2024 Brain Tumor Segmentation Challenge: Meningioma Radiotherapy
size: 750 radiotherapy-planning brain MRIs (multi-institutional) with expert GTV annotations on the training/validation partitions
multi_sequence_detail: Single 3D post-contrast T1-weighted radiotherapy-planning MRI in native acquisition space (defaced); not a multi-sequence set
segmentation_detail: Single-label expert-annotated gross tumor volume (GTV) / at-risk post-operative site for radiotherapy planning, approved by neuroradiologists and radiation oncologists
description: BraTS-MEN-RT is the largest multi-institutional collection of 3D post-contrast T1-weighted radiotherapy-planning MRIs of intracranial meningiomas with expert gross tumor volume (GTV) annotations for automated radiotherapy target delineation.

name: BraTS-GoAT 2024
size: Pooled multi-tumor BraTS cohort (thousands of cases across glioma, meningioma, metastases, pediatric)
multi_sequence_detail: Co-registered, skull-stripped multiparametric MRI: T1, T1-contrast-enhanced (T1c), T2, and T2-FLAIR
segmentation_detail: Expert-annotated tumor sub-region masks (enhancing tumor, tumor core, whole tumor) pooled across glioma, meningioma, brain metastases and pediatric tumors
description: The BraTS-GoAT 2024 task benchmarks the generalizability of brain-tumor segmentation methods by pooling co-registered, skull-stripped multiparametric MRI across diverse tumor types with expert sub-region masks.

name: UCSF-PDGM
full_name: University of California San Francisco Preoperative Diffuse Glioma MRI
multi_sequence_detail: Standardized 3T single-scanner protocol: 3D T1 pre/post-contrast, T2, T2/FLAIR, SWI, DWI, HARDI (high angular resolution diffusion), and ASL perfusion
segmentation_detail: Manual tumor segmentation masks with three compartments: enhancing tumor, non-enhancing/necrotic core, and surrounding FLAIR abnormality
description: UCSF-PDGM contains standardized preoperative multi-sequence 3T brain MRI of 495 histopathologically proven diffuse gliomas with manual tumor segmentations and molecular/clinical labels, hosted on TCIA in NIfTI format.

name: UCSF-ALPTDG
full_name: University of California San Francisco Adult Longitudinal Post-Treatment Diffuse Glioma MRI
anatomy: Brain (adult diffuse glioma, post-treatment longitudinal follow-up)
size: 298 patients; 596 post-treatment MRI exams (two consecutive posttreatment timepoints per patient)
multi_sequence_detail: Multimodal 3D brain MRI: T1 pre-contrast, T1 post-contrast, T2, and T2-FLAIR, acquired on a standardized 3.0-T protocol across two longitudinal timepoints
segmentation_detail: Expert voxelwise segmentations of four tumor subregions (enhancing tissue, nonenhancing FLAIR hyperintensity, nonenhancing tumor core, resection cavity) plus longitudinal change annotations tracking ET and SNFH between timepoints
license: Noncommercial research use; data use agreement required
description: UCSF-ALPTDG is a longitudinal post-treatment adult diffuse glioma dataset of multimodal 3D brain MRI (T1 pre/post-contrast, T2, FLAIR) from 298 patients scanned at two consecutive posttreatment timepoints, with expert voxelwise tumor subregion and longitudinal-change segmentations, hosted by the UCSF Center for Intelligent Imaging under a data use agreement.

name: SPIDER
full_name: Lumbar Spine Segmentation in MR Images: A Dataset and Public Benchmark
size: 218 studies, 447 sagittal T1/T2 MRI series (~3.8 GB)
paired_text_detail: CSV/metadata with patient demographics, scanner parameters, and per-IVD radiological degenerative gradings (not free-text reports)
multi_sequence_detail: Sagittal T1- and T2-weighted lumbar MRI series
segmentation_detail: Reference masks for vertebrae, intervertebral discs, and spinal canal
description: SPIDER is a multi-vendor lumbar spine MRI dataset of 218 studies (447 sagittal T1/T2 series from four hospitals) with reference segmentations of vertebrae, discs, and spinal canal plus per-level degenerative radiological gradings.

name: RSNA 2024 Lumbar Spine Degenerative Classification
multi_sequence_detail: Sagittal T1, sagittal T2/STIR, and axial T2 lumbar MRI series per study
segmentation_detail: Coordinate (point) labels at disc levels rather than pixel masks
other_labels: 3 severity grades (Normal/Mild, Moderate, Severe) across 5 disc levels (L1/L2-L5/S1)
description: The RSNA 2024 challenge provides multi-sequence lumbar spine MRI studies in DICOM with per-level severity labels for five degenerative conditions across five disc levels plus coordinate keypoint annotations.

name: MRSpineSeg
full_name: MRSpineSeg Challenge (MICCAI CSI 2019): Lumbar Spine MRI Vertebrae and Intervertebral Disc Segmentation
size: 172 training + 20 (round-1) + 23 (round-2) sagittal T2-weighted lumbar MRI volumes (test labels withheld)
multi_sequence_detail: Sagittal T2-weighted lumbar MRI only
segmentation_detail: Multi-class voxel masks of individual vertebrae (e.g. L1-L5, T9-T12, S1) and intervertebral discs, up to ~20 label classes
host: MICCAI CSI 2019 MRSpineSeg Challenge (authors' repo; public mirror on Baidu AI Studio / PaddleSeg MedicalSeg)
description: MRSpineSeg provides 172 sagittal T2-weighted lumbar spine MRI volumes in NIfTI with multi-class segmentation masks of individual vertebrae and intervertebral discs (up to ~20 classes).

name: Gold Atlas
full_name: Gold Atlas Male Pelvis MR-CT Dataset
multi_sequence_detail: T1- and T2-weighted MRI with deformably registered CT
segmentation_detail: Radiotherapy-relevant pelvic organ delineations by 5 expert observers with consensus and STAPLE masks
description: The Gold Atlas dataset provides paired T1/T2-weighted MRI and registered CT DICOM data of 19 male pelvises with multi-observer organ delineations for MR-to-CT synthesis and segmentation research.

name: MSLesSeg 2024
multi_sequence_detail: T1-weighted, T2-weighted, and FLAIR per timepoint; scans registered to MNI-152 and skull-stripped
segmentation_detail: Manual MS lesion masks annotated on FLAIR by two operators and validated by an MS specialist neurologist
description: MSLesSeg 2024 is a longitudinal multi-center MS brain MRI dataset (~90 patients, ~150 timepoints) with T1/T2/FLAIR sequences and expert-validated FLAIR lesion segmentations in NIfTI format.

name: Lausanne TOF-MRA Aneurysm Cohort
full_name: Lausanne Brain Aneurysm TOF-MRA Cohort (OpenNeuro ds003949)
multi_sequence_detail: Time-of-flight MR angiography (TOF-MRA) plus a T1-weighted structural volume for each subject
segmentation_detail: Voxel-wise binary manual aneurysm segmentation masks for patients in BIDS derivatives (manual_masks); also skull-stripped volumes and N4 bias-corrected derivatives
other_labels: probabilistic vessel atlas co-registered to subject space
description: OpenNeuro cohort of 284 TOF-MRA brain scans (157 aneurysm patients, 127 healthy controls) with voxel-wise manual aneurysm segmentation masks and T1w volumes in BIDS format for detection and segmentation research.

name: ChestX-Det
segmentation_detail: Polygon instance-segmentation contours plus bounding boxes for 13 thoracic disease categories (Atelectasis, Calcification, Cardiomegaly, Consolidation, Diffuse Nodule, Effusion, Emphysema, Fibrosis, Fracture, Mass, Nodule, Pleural Thickening, Pneumothorax), annotated by three board-certified radiologists
description: Extension of ChestX-Det10 with 3,578 NIH chest X-rays annotated with polygon instance-segmentation masks and bounding boxes for 13 thoracic abnormalities by three radiologists.

name: TBX11K
other_labels: bounding boxes for active/obsolete (latent) TB lesions
image-level classes: healthy, sick but non-TB, active TB, latent/obsolete TB
host: mmcheng.net (Nankai University Media Computing Lab); train/val via Google Drive & Baidu, test on CodaLab
description: 11,200 chest X-rays (512x512) with image-level TB categories and bounding-box annotations of tuberculosis lesions, with the test set held out for an online CodaLab challenge.

name: NODE21
full_name: NODE21 Nodule Detection and Generation Challenge
size: 4,882 frontal chest radiographs (1,134 with 1,476 nodule bounding boxes; 3,748 nodule-free) plus LUNA16-derived CT nodule patches
other_labels: 50x50x50mm CT nodule patches for generation track
license: permissive (aggregated from JSRT, PadChest, ChestX-ray14, Open-i; sources permit redistribution)
description: Public NODE21 training set of 4,882 frontal chest radiographs (1024x1024 MHA) with lung-nodule bounding boxes plus LUNA16 CT nodule patches, for a chest-nodule detection-and-generation challenge.

name: JSRT
full_name: Japanese Society of Radiological Technology Standard Digital Image Database (chest radiographs)
size: 247 posterior-anterior chest radiographs (154 with a lung nodule: 100 malignant, 54 benign; 93 without nodules); 2048x2048, 12-bit, 0.175 mm pixel spacing
segmentation_detail: No masks in the base dataset; lung/heart/clavicle segmentation masks are available via the separate SCR (Segmentation in Chest Radiographs) add-on dataset.
license: Free for research use (registration/request via JSRT)
description: Classic public reference database of 247 high-resolution 12-bit posterior-anterior chest radiographs (154 with lung nodules) widely used as a benchmark for nodule detection and, with the SCR add-on, lung/heart/clavicle segmentation.

name: SIIM-FISABIO-RSNA COVID-19
other_labels: image-level bounding boxes for pulmonary opacities
study-level labels: negative for pneumonia / typical / indeterminate / atypical COVID-19 appearance
description: COVID-19 chest radiographs in DICOM format with four-class study-level appearance labels and image-level bounding boxes annotating pulmonary opacities.

name: MIDRC
full_name: Medical Imaging and Data Resource Center
anatomy: chest/thorax (COVID-19-focused), expanding to oncology and other organ systems
size: hundreds of thousands of imaging studies across tens of thousands of patients
segmentation_detail: Expert annotations including segmentations are available for select cohorts/challenges but not across the full commons
host: MIDRC (University of Chicago / Gen3 data commons)
description: MIDRC is an open federated data commons of DICOM chest radiograph and CT (and expanding MRI/oncology) imaging studies with clinical metadata, accessible to registered researchers via the Gen3 data portal under a data use agreement.

name: Parse2022
segmentation_detail: Pulmonary artery segmentation labels refined from annotations by 10 clinicians (multi-level pulmonary artery structures)
license: Research use with signed data agreement
description: A contrast-enhanced CT pulmonary angiography (CTPA) dataset of 200 volumes with refined multi-annotator pulmonary artery segmentation labels for the MICCAI 2022 PARSE challenge.

name: VESSEL12
segmentation_detail: Reference standard for probabilistic lung blood vessel segmentation (vessel/non-vessel voxel annotations)
description: A chest CT dataset of 20 scans with reference annotations for benchmarking automatic lung blood vessel segmentation methods.

name: CAS2023
segmentation_detail: Voxel-wise intracranial cerebral artery (vessel) segmentation masks on TOF-MRA volumes
description: CAS2023 is a time-of-flight MRA challenge dataset providing intracranial cerebral artery segmentation annotations for vessel segmentation.

name: ReMIND
full_name: The Brain Resection Multimodal Imaging Database
size: 114 subjects; 43.6 GB (preop MRI 4 sequences, 301 intraop MRI series, 320 intraop 3D US series)
paired_text_detail: Clinical data CSV files with patient demographics, histopathology, and molecular test results
multi_sequence_detail: Preoperative multiparametric MRI (T1, contrast-enhanced T1, T2, T2-FLAIR) plus intraoperative 3T MRI and 3D intraoperative ultrasound
segmentation_detail: 356 segmentations (NRRD and DICOM-SEG) of preoperative tumor, cerebrum, ventricles, and residual tumor
description: Pre- and intra-operative multimodal imaging from 114 neurosurgical brain-tumor patients including preoperative multiparametric MRI, intraoperative MRI, and 3D intraoperative ultrasound with 356 tumor and anatomical segmentations.

name: Burdenko-GBM-Progression
multi_sequence_detail: MRI T1, T1C, T2, FLAIR sequences plus planning CT
segmentation_detail: RTSTRUCT GTV/CTV/PTV radiotherapy target volumes and 10 anatomical organ-at-risk structures (eyes, lenses, optic nerves, brain, brainstem, chiasm, head contour); follow-up tumor volumes for a subset
other_labels: genomic data (IDH1/2 mutation n=110, MGMT methylation n=92)
license: NIH Controlled Data Access (images); CC BY 4.0 (clinical data)
description: Radiotherapy planning MRI and CT with RTSTRUCT tumor and organ-at-risk segmentations, RTPLAN/RTDOSE, and genetic/clinical response data from 180 glioblastoma patients treated 2014-2020, hosted on TCIA.

name: RHUH-GBM
full_name: Rio Hortega University Hospital Glioblastoma Dataset
size: 40 patients; ~600 series, 37,425 DICOM images (15.96 GB) plus 2.9 GB NIfTI
multi_sequence_detail: Multiparametric MRI: T1w, T2w, FLAIR, T1w contrast-enhanced (T1ce), and DWI-derived ADC maps across preoperative, early postoperative, and recurrence/follow-up timepoints
segmentation_detail: Expert-validated tumor subregion segmentations (enhancing tumor, necrosis, peritumoral/edema region) in NIfTI for preoperative, postoperative, and follow-up scans
other_labels: clinical data (age, sex, Karnofsky performance score, survival, resection extent, therapy, IDH status, ATRX mutation, Ki-67 index)
description: Multiparametric brain MRI (T1w, T2w, FLAIR, T1ce, ADC) from 40 glioblastoma patients with >95% resection spanning preoperative, early postoperative, and recurrence scans, with expert-validated tumor subregion segmentations and clinical data.

name: Colorectal-Liver-Metastases
full_name: Preoperative CT and Survival Data for Patients Undergoing Resection of Colorectal Liver Metastases
segmentation_detail: DICOM-SEG segmentations of liver, liver remnant, hepatic veins, portal veins, and tumors
description: Preoperative portal-venous contrast-enhanced CT with liver, vessel, and tumor DICOM-SEG segmentations and survival data from 197 patients undergoing resection of colorectal liver metastases.

name: HCC-TACE-Seg
full_name: Multimodality Annotated HCC Cases with and without Advanced Imaging Segmentation
multi_sequence_detail: Pre- and post-procedure (multi-phase) CT imaging studies
segmentation_detail: Manual DICOM-SEG segmentations of liver, tumor, and blood vessels
description: Pre- and post-procedure CT of 105 HCC patients who underwent TACE (2002-2012), with manual liver/tumor/vessel DICOM-SEG segmentations and treatment-outcome data.

name: Adrenal-ACC-Ki67-Seg
full_name: Voxel-level Segmentation of Pathologically-proven Adrenocortical Carcinoma with Ki-67 Expression
segmentation_detail: Voxel-level segmentation of the adrenal lesion, created semi-automatically with AMIRA then manually refined by a radiologist
description: Contrast-enhanced CT (2006-2018) of 53 pathologically-proven adrenocortical carcinoma patients in DICOM with voxel-level tumor segmentations and Ki-67 index labels for radiomics research.

name: Pediatric-CT-SEG
full_name: Pediatric Chest/Abdomen/Pelvic CT Exams with Expert Organ Contours
segmentation_detail: Expert contours of up to 29 organ structures in DICOM RTSTRUCT format
description: Pediatric chest/abdomen/pelvis CT from 359 patients (ages 5 days to 16 years) with expert contours of up to 29 organs in RTSTRUCT format for autosegmentation and CT dosimetry research.

name: Meningioma-SEG-CLASS
full_name: Segmentation and Classification of Grade I and II Meningiomas from MRI: An Open Annotated Dataset
multi_sequence_detail: MRI T1, T1 contrast-enhanced (T1-CE), and T2-FLAIR sequences
segmentation_detail: Manual tumor contours (DICOM SEG) on T1-CE and T2-FLAIR images, reviewed by a central nervous system radiation oncology specialist
other_labels: clinical data (demographics, subtype, surgery type, tumor location, atypical features)
license: CC BY 4.0 (clinical data); NIH Controlled Data Access Policy for images
description: Multiparametric brain MRI (T1, T1-CE, T2-FLAIR) from 96 treatment-naive intracranial meningioma patients with expert manual tumor segmentations and pathologically confirmed WHO grade I/II classification, hosted on TCIA.

name: Pancreatic-CT-CBCT-SEG
full_name: Pancreatic CT and Cone-Beam CT with Organ-at-Risk Segmentations
multi_sequence_detail: Paired diagnostic-quality planning CT (helical, contrast) and cone-beam CT (CBCT, mostly limited-view acquisitions)
segmentation_detail: Expert manual organ-at-risk delineations (stomach with first two duodenal segments, small bowel) by radiation oncologists, provided as RTSTRUCT contours on both planning CT and CBCT
description: Paired planning CT and cone-beam CT scans with expert organ-at-risk RTSTRUCT segmentations and RTDOSE from 40 locally advanced pancreatic cancer patients undergoing ablative radiotherapy, hosted openly on TCIA.

name: GLIS-RT
full_name: Glioma Image Segmentation for Radiotherapy: RT Targets, Barriers to Cancer Spread, and Organs at Risk
multi_sequence_detail: Contrast-enhanced 3D T1 and 2D T2-FLAIR MRI plus planning CT with registrations (REG)
segmentation_detail: Manual RTSTRUCT delineations of RT targets (GTV/CTV), organs at risk (brainstem, optic chiasm, optic nerves, eyes, cochleae, lacrimal glands), and anatomical barriers on a 75-case subset (falx, tentorium, ventricles, cerebellum)
license: TCIA Data Usage Policy (NIH Controlled Data Access)
description: Glioblastoma and low-grade glioma cases from 230 patients with expert-delineated radiotherapy targets, organs at risk, and anatomical barriers on co-registered planning CT and MRI in DICOM, hosted on TCIA.

name: Prostate-MRI-US-Biopsy
full_name: Prostate MRI and Ultrasound With Pathology and Coordinates of Tracked Biopsy
paired_text_detail: Biopsy pathology outcomes with Gleason grades and MRI ROI suspicion scores per tracked biopsy core (XLSX spreadsheets)
multi_sequence_detail: T2-weighted plus diffusion-weighted imaging (ADC, high b-value) for 837 subjects
segmentation_detail: Prostate gland surfaces and suspicious ROI segmentations as STL surface files with tracked biopsy core locations
description: TCIA collection of tracked MRI-ultrasound fusion biopsy data from 1,151 prostate cancer patients, including multiparametric MRI (DICOM), 3D ultrasound, Gleason pathology outcomes, tracked biopsy coordinates, and STL prostate/ROI segmentations (v2 updated 2023).

name: LUNA25
size: Over 4,000 annotated low-dose chest CT exams for development, 468 hidden test cases, 300 reader-study cases
description: A low-dose chest CT benchmark of over 4,000 annotated exams for lung nodule malignancy risk estimation in lung cancer screening.

name: AbdomenAtlas 1.0
anatomy: Abdominal organs (spleen, liver, kidneys, stomach, gallbladder, pancreas, aorta, IVC)
segmentation_detail: Voxel-level masks for eight structures: spleen, liver, kidneys, stomach, gallbladder, pancreas, aorta, and IVC
description: One of the largest fully annotated abdominal CT segmentation datasets, with 5,195 volumes labeled for eight organs.

name: FLARE 2024
full_name: MICCAI FLARE 2024 Abdominal CT Organ Segmentation (Task 2: Laptop)
size: Thousands of partially labeled and unlabeled abdominal CT scans (large semi-supervised set)
segmentation_detail: Abdominal organ segmentation labels (multi-organ) with large unlabeled data for semi-supervised learning; related FLARE tasks also cover pan-cancer tumor segmentation
description: An abdominal CT organ segmentation benchmark emphasizing efficient, resource-constrained (laptop) inference and semi-supervised learning from large unlabeled data.

name: M3D-Seg
size: ~5,772 3D CT images with 149,196 3D mask annotations (~240 GB), aggregated from 25 datasets
paired_text_detail: Text descriptions of semantic labels supporting text-based and referring segmentation; the broader M3D suite adds VQA and report data
segmentation_detail: 149,196 3D masks across organs including kidney, liver, pancreas, spleen, lung, colon, heart, bone and vessels, stored as .npz sparse masks
description: A large aggregated 3D CT segmentation dataset from 25 public sources with ~149K 3D masks and text-linked semantic labels supporting semantic, referring, and reasoning segmentation.

name: OpenMind
full_name: OpenMind: Large-Scale Brain MRI Pretraining Dataset
size: ~114K MRI images (1.04 TB) curated from 800 OpenNeuro datasets across 30+ scanners
multi_sequence_detail: 23 different MRI modalities/techniques including T1w, T2, inplaneT2 and others
segmentation_detail: Includes deface masks and anatomy masks (not tumor/organ segmentation targets)
description: A large-scale brain MRI pretraining dataset of ~114K NIfTI images spanning 23 sequence types curated from 800 OpenNeuro datasets across 30+ scanners for self-supervised foundation models.

name: fastMRI Prostate
full_name: fastMRI Prostate: A Public, Biparametric MRI Dataset
multi_sequence_detail: Axial T2-weighted and axial diffusion-weighted (DWI) sequences (biparametric)
license: fastMRI Data Sharing Agreement (research use only)
description: Raw multi-coil k-space data from 312 prostate MRI exams acquired on 3T scanners, comprising axial T2-weighted and diffusion-weighted acquisitions for accelerated reconstruction research.

name: fastMRI Breast
multi_sequence_detail: Axial dynamic contrast-enhanced (DCE) 3D GRASP sequence acquired at 3T
license: fastMRI Data Sharing Agreement (research use only)
description: Raw k-space data from 300 clinical breast DCE-MRI exams acquired on 3T scanners with a 3D GRASP sequence for accelerated MRI reconstruction research.

name: K2S
full_name: K2S: From Undersampled K-space To Automatic Segmentation Challenge
segmentation_detail: Bone and cartilage tissue segmentation masks paired with fully-sampled/undersampled k-space and reconstructed images
description: Grand Challenge dataset of 300 training and 50 test 3D fat-suppressed FSE-Cube knee MRIs providing 8x undersampled multi-channel k-space, fully-sampled images, and bone/cartilage segmentation masks for joint MRI reconstruction and segmentation.

name: M4Raw
full_name: M4Raw: A Multi-contrast, Multi-repetition, Multi-channel MRI k-space Dataset for Low-field MRI Research
multi_sequence_detail: T1-weighted, T2-weighted, FLAIR, and GRE contrasts, each with multiple repetitions for multi-repetition averaging
description: Multi-channel brain MRI k-space data from 183 healthy volunteers scanned on a 0.3T low-field whole-body scanner, with T1/T2/FLAIR/GRE contrasts and multiple repetitions to enable low-field MRI reconstruction and denoising research.

name: ACRIN-NSCLC-FDG-PET
full_name: Data from the ACRIN 6668 Trial NSCLC-FDG-PET
paired_text_detail: Clinical XLS spreadsheets: demographics, diagnosis, treatment, follow-up, and measurement data (anonymized)
segmentation_detail: Tumor segmentations available separately via the BAMF AIMI Annotations initiative (not part of the primary TCIA release)
description: 242 NSCLC patients from the ACRIN 6668/RTOG 0235 trial with serial pre- and post-chemoradiotherapy FDG PET/CT DICOM imaging plus clinical and outcome spreadsheets.

name: ACRIN-HNSCC-FDG-PET-CT
full_name: ACRIN 6685: A Multicenter Trial of FDG-PET/CT Staging of Head and Neck Cancer
paired_text_detail: Clinical data (classification, demographic, diagnosis, follow-up, measurement, treatment) provided as XLS/CSV/PDF with data dictionary
segmentation_detail: Tumor annotations available via related analysis result 'ACRIN 6685-Tumor-Annotations'
license: NIH Controlled Data Access (imaging); CC BY 4.0 (clinical)
description: 260 head-and-neck cancer patients from the ACRIN 6685 multicenter trial with FDG PET/CT staging imaging, tumor annotations, and pathology-correlated clinical data hosted on TCIA.

name: ACRIN-FMISO-Brain
full_name: ACRIN 6684: Assessment of Tumor Hypoxia in Newly Diagnosed Glioblastoma Using 18F-FMISO PET and MRI
paired_text_detail: ~30 clinical forms (~2,000 elements) with demographics, diagnosis, treatment, follow-up, and pathology biomarkers (MGMT status, HIF1-alpha, GLUT1, CAIX, CD31, alpha-SMA); provided as CSV/XLSX
multi_sequence_detail: Multiple MRI sequences alongside 18F-FMISO PET and low-dose CT
segmentation_detail: Binary DICOM VOI masks: 18F-FMISO PET hypoxia maps and MRI enhancing tumor lesion masks
license: CC BY 3.0 (clinical data); NIH Controlled Data Access (imaging)
description: TCIA collection of 45 newly diagnosed glioblastoma patients imaged with 18F-FMISO hypoxia PET plus MRI and low-dose CT, including binary DICOM hypoxia and enhancing-tumor VOI masks and detailed clinical forms.

name: ACRIN-FLT-Breast
paired_text_detail: ~40 clinical forms (CSV/XLS): demographics, medical history, treatment, pathology, measurements, follow-up
description: 83 locally advanced breast-cancer patients from the ACRIN 6688 Phase II trial with 18F-FLT and FDG PET/CT imaging for early neoadjuvant chemotherapy response assessment.

name: Anti-PD-1_Melanoma
paired_text_detail: Patient outcomes and treatment details provided where available
license: CC BY 3.0 (imaging under NIH Controlled Data Access)
description: 47 melanoma patients treated with anti-PD-1 immunotherapy with pre-treatment and follow-up PET, CT, and MR imaging, distributed as DICOM under NIH Controlled Data Access.

name: Anti-PD-1_Lung
paired_text_detail: Supporting clinical metadata including patient outcomes and treatment details provided where available
segmentation_detail: Segmentations available via IDC Zenodo (BAMF AIMI Annotations initiative)
description: FDG PET/CT imaging of 46 lung-cancer patients treated with anti-PD-1 immunotherapy, with pre-treatment baseline and follow-up scans.

name: Soft-tissue-Sarcoma
paired_text_detail: Clinical spreadsheet (XLSX): demographics, histopathological type, tumor grade, outcome follow-up (metastases, survival)
multi_sequence_detail: MRI sequences T1-weighted, T2-weighted fat-saturated, and STIR alongside FDG PET/CT
segmentation_detail: Expert manual GTV_Mass and GTV_Edema tumor contours as RTSTRUCT DICOM objects for all scans
description: 51 soft-tissue sarcoma patients with FDG PET/CT and multi-sequence MRI (T1, T2FS, STIR) and expert manual tumor/edema RTSTRUCT segmentations plus clinical outcome data on TCIA.

name: DeepLesion
size: 32,735 lesions on 32,120 CT slices from 4,427 patients (~225 GB)
license: NIH open access (free for research use)
description: A large-scale CT dataset of 32,735 clinically significant lesions across 4,427 patients, mined from radiologist bookmarks with bounding boxes and RECIST diameter measurements, stored as 16-bit PNG slices.

name: RadImageNet
anatomy: Multiple (whole body; CT/MRI/US across many anatomical regions)
size: ~1.35 million annotated images from 131,000+ patients (CT, MRI, ultrasound)
paired_text_detail: Pathology/anatomy class labels rather than free-text reports or captions
segmentation_detail: Image-level pathology labels, not segmentation masks
license: RadImageNet license (free for non-commercial research; commercial licensing available)
description: RadImageNet is a large open medical imaging database of ~1.35 million CT, MRI, and ultrasound images with anatomy and pathology labels, built as a domain-specific pretraining resource for transfer learning.
